title: Pefindo assigns “idA-” rating to Sarana Mitra Luas
body: PT Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo) has assigned an "idA-" rating for PT Sarana Mitra Luas Tbk (SMIL), an issuer that operates in the forklift rental sector.

title: Index52 Constituents: AUTO vs SMSM dividend yield
body: Two constituents in the 52 High Dividend Index in the vehicle spare parts industry, PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO) and PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk (SMSM) pocketed dividend yield growth in 2022 to 2023.

title: BFIN to issue bond of IDR 600 billion
body: PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN) is planning the issuance of Bond VI Phase I Year 2024 with total maximum principal set to IDR 600 billion on September 18-20, 2024.

title: Turning back, MDRN scored IDR 2.84 billion of profit
body: PT Modern Internasional Tbk (MDRN), the sole distributor of Fujifilm products in Indonesia, booked net profit of IDR 2.84 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Foreign investment plummeted 22.41% in Q2 2024
body: Foreign investment in the second quarter (Q2) of 2024 slipped 22.41% compared to the first quarter (Q1) of 2024, and 11.88% lower compared to Q2 2023.

title: Pefindo assigns “idA-” rating to Sarana Mitra Luas
body: PT Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo) has assigned an "idA-" rating for PT Sarana Mitra Luas Tbk (SMIL), an issuer that operates in the forklift rental sector.

title: Index52 Constituents: AUTO vs SMSM dividend yield
body: Two constituents in the 52 High Dividend Index in the vehicle spare parts industry, PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO) and PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk (SMSM) pocketed dividend yield growth in 2022 to 2023.

title: BFIN to issue bond of IDR 600 billion
body: PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN) is planning the issuance of Bond VI Phase I Year 2024 with total maximum principal set to IDR 600 billion on September 18-20, 2024.

title: Turning back, MDRN scored IDR 2.84 billion of profit
body: PT Modern Internasional Tbk (MDRN), the sole distributor of Fujifilm products in Indonesia, booked net profit of IDR 2.84 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Foreign investment plummeted 22.41% in Q2 2024
body: Foreign investment in the second quarter (Q2) of 2024 slipped 22.41% compared to the first quarter (Q1) of 2024, and 11.88% lower compared to Q2 2023.

title: Foreign buying volume reaches 3.63 billion shares, net foreign volume closed at 869.49 million shares
body: Foreign investors appeared to expand their share purchases on Tuesday, August 20, with the foreign purchase volume hitting 3.63 billion shares. This increase was due, in part, to foreign investors buying up to 1.51 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for a net volume of 357.11 million shares. The foreign sales volume was 2.76 billion shares, and the net foreign volume was closed at 869.49 million shares.

title: FIF Finance to issue Bond of IDR 2.5 trillion
body: PT Federal International Finance/FIF Finance will issue Shelf-Registration Bond VI Phase IV Year 2024 of IDR 2.5 trillion. The bond will be issued in two series and guaranteed with full commitment.

title: Maharaksa Biru Energi (OASA) now owns 5% share after purchasing its own shares
body: On Monday, August 19, the renewable energy company PT Maharaksa Biru Energi Tbk (OASA) purchased approximately 317.36 million of its own shares. After PT Danatama Makmur Sekuritas completed this transaction, the issuer now owns 5% of the shares. In the meantime, OASA's controller, Gafur Sulistyo Umar, recorded a decrease in shares from 55.58% to 50.58% because he sold the same number of shares through the same securities company.

title: Seven Indeks52 constituents set dividend yield to 5-16%
body: Indeks52 High Dividend category reported several constituents recording dividend yield of over 5% for the fiscal year (FY) 2023.

title: SMSM bags dividend of IDR 46.64 billion
body: PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk (SMSM) scored dividend income of IDR 46.64 billion from two of its subsidiaries, PT Panata Jaya Mandiri (PJM) and PT Prapat Tunggal Cipta (PTC).

title: Batavia Prosperindo Internasional sets up interim dividend distribution of IDR 4.55 per share
body: PT Batavia Prosperindo Internasional Tbk (BPII) will distribute interim dividend of IDR 4.55 per share or IDR 45 billion in total.

title: SUN’s bids break records, reaching IDR 104.07 trillion
body: Total incoming bids for the auction of Government Securities (SUN) yesterday (20/8) reached IDR 104.07 trillion, as stated by DJPPR of the Ministry of Finance.

title: OJK: “High NPL in banks is cyclical in nature”
body: Chief Executive of Banking of Financial Services Authority (OJK), Dian Ediana Rae, believes that the current high non-performing loan (NPL) ratio is cyclical in nature, meaning that it may fluctuate according to changes in economic condition.

title: BPII to channel IDR 20 billion of capital for subsidiary in Singapore
body: PT Batavia Prosperindo Internasional Tbk (BPII), an investment and financial services holding company, has allocated extra capital of SGD 1.68 million or equal to IDR 20 billion.

title: PPRO’s Louvin Apartment now 91% sold
body: PT PP Properti Tbk (PPRO) successfully marketed 755 units out of 826 total units of Louvin Apartment in Jatinangor, East Bandung, West Java as of July 2024.

title: Morning session saw JCI breaking records
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) soared to 7,586.78 at today’s (21/8) opening bell, surpassing the number seen last Tuesday’s (20/8) morning.

title: FAPA scored another dividend income, this time worth IDR 72.5 billion
body: PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (FAPA), a palm plantation company operating since 1994, revealed another round of dividend income of IDR 72.5 billion.

title: Widodo Makmur Unggas faces PKPU lawsuit against 2 creditors
body: PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk (WMUU), an integrated farm company, has received a Suspension of Debt Payment Obligation (lit. Penundaan Kewajiban Pembayaran Utang/PKPU) claim issued through Central Jakarta Commercial Court.

title: First half of the year, PANI scored IDR 286 billion
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI) booked net profit of IDR 286 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024, up 35% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 211 billion seen in the same period in 2023.

title: Summarecon to restructure subsidiary in IKN
body: PT Summarecon Agung Tbk (SMRA) restructures its portion in PT Nusantara Selaras Sejati (NTSS), whose operation is located in Penajam Paser Utara, East Kalimantan.

title: Stagnant sales, Mustika Ratu still saw surge in net profit
body: PT Mustika Ratu Tbk (MRAT), a cosmetic and body care product manufacturer, scored net profit of IDR 302.19 million in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Foreign investors buy Gojek Tokopedia’s shares up to 455 million shares, net foreign closed at 318.16 million shares
body: On Monday, August 19, foreign investors purchased 455.61 million shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), for a net volume of 259.60 million. These acquisitions amounted to 21.83% of the entire foreign purchase volume, which was 2.08 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was 1.76 billion shares, with net foreign volume closing at 318.16 million shares.

title: Two major Bintang Samudera Mandiri Lines (BSML) investors increase their shares
body: Two major shareholders in PT Bintang Samudera Mandiri Lines Tbk (BSML) made the decision to increase their stake in this shipping and logistics company on Friday, August 16. PT Goldfive Investment Capital first bought 18.18 million shares through PT Yuanta Sekuritas Indonesia, increasing its shareholding from 45.76% to 46.74%. Subsequently, PT Sanca Griya Modalindo procured an additional 103,800 shares, elevating its stake to 6.02% from its previous holding of 6.01% in BSML.

title: Planning subsidiary’s IPO, TPIA saw correction in stock
body: Stock performance of PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA) fell off at today’s (20/8) closing bell, as if reflecting the market’s response towards its plan to debut its subsidiary in the stock exchange.

title: OJK urges Jiwasraya to address policyholders refusing restructure
body: Financial Services Authority (OJK) urges PT Asuransi Jiwasraya (Persero) to conclude the policyholders dispute resolution in a comprehensive way.

title: At default, Pefindo lowered ZINC’s bond rating
body: Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo), a domestic rating agency, has lowered the rating of Bond I Year 2018 issued by PT Kapuas Prima Coal Tbk (ZINC) to “idD” from the previous “idCCC”.

title: KIJA to allocate IDR 450 billion of capex
body: PT Kawasan Indutri Jababeka Tbk (KIJA) is allocating capital expenditure of IDR 450 billion this year. The allocation is split to 55% for land acquisition and 45% for infrastructure maintenance.

title: First session saw JCI’s bullish trend
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was seen gaining strides in the green zone, starting from the opening bell today (20/8) until the end of its first session.

title: Chandra Asri Pacific plans to debut its subsidiary in the stock market
body: PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA), another company owned by Prajogo Pangestu, will push forward the agenda of debuting its subsidiary engaged in the infrastructure investment sector, PT Chandra Daya Investasi (CDI), in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Rebranded for two months now, ACES saw IDR 2 trillion decline in market cap
body: PT Ace Hardaware Indonesia Tbk (ACES) has rebranded itself to PT Aspirasi Hidup Indonesia Tbk following the Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on June 7, 2024.

title: Promoting MSME financing, Modalku joins hands with Lotte Grosir
body: Modalku, a fintech platform, is partnering with Lotte Grosir to provide term financing for raw material purchase for Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs).

title: Working on hydropower plant, ARKO secures loan facility of IDR 23 billion from SMI
body: PT Arkora Hydro Tbk (ARKO), a holding company engaged in the renewable energy sector, has obtained a loan facility worth IDR 223 billion for the establishment of Tomoni Hydropower Plant.

title: Oto Multiartha eyes IDR 700 billion in bond issuance
body: PT Oto Multiartha, a financing company formed by PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) and PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk (SMMA), will issue Shelf-Registration Bond I Phase II Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 700 billion.

title: FAP Agri scored dividend income of IDR 47.5 billion
body: PT FAP Agri Tbk (FAPA), a palm oil manufacturer, reported dividend income of IDR 47.5 billion.

title: Investors in Estee Gold Feet (EURO) actively trading shares
body: Major PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO) investors were busy trading shares on Thursday, August 15. PT Solusi Karya Sukses and PT Fersindo Nusa Jaya have opted to increase their shareholdings in the aerosol company for cosmetics and home appliances by 20.07 million and 9.57 million shares, respectively. Right now, both are in charge of roughly 8.5-8.7% stakes. On the other hand, PT Majukarya Mandiri Indonesia sold 10.38 million shares, and PT Firstindo Finansial Corpora sold 50 million shares.
